name: ai:review-passed
description: AI reviewer verdict: APPROVED (canon §5.1 required state label)

name: ai:review-changes
description: AI reviewer verdict: CHANGES_REQUESTED (canon §5.1 required state label)

name: ai:human-review-required
description: Fork PR or non-allowlisted author (canon §5.1 required state label)

name: skip-ai-review
description: Operator override to re-fire ai-review (canon §5.1 required state label)

name: ai:autofix-applied
description: AI autofix applied (IPLAN-0014 operational label; not canon §5.1 required — optional but recommended for repos consuming ai-review with autofix)

name: governance
description: PR touches CLAUDE.md, ops/DECISIONS.md, .claude/agents/, .claude/skills/, or .github/ai-review/ (canon §5.2 diff-class: governance-docs-root + agents-and-skills + ai-review-config)

name: docs
description: PR touches docs/, README.md, CHANGELOG.md, or ops/HANDOFF.md (canon §5.2 diff-class: docs)

name: agents
description: PR touches .claude/agents/, .claude/skills/, or .claude/workflows/ (canon §5.2 diff-class: agents-and-skills + workflow-js)

name: config
description: PR touches Dockerfile, pyproject.toml, requirements*.txt, package*.json, uv.lock, or .pre-commit-config.yaml (canon §5.2 diff-class: deps-config)

name: plans
description: PR touches ops/iplans/IPLAN-*.md or plans/PLAN-*.md (canon §5.2 diff-class: plans / verified-planning)

name: security
description: Security-tagged issue or PR (canon §5.3 area label)
